lines.text: 58-year-old woman with Stage IV lung adenocarcinoma (AJCC 8th ed).
NGS: EGFR exon 19 deletion (p.E746_A750del). ALK/ROS1 negative.
First-line osimertinib 80 mg daily started 2025-09; radiographic progression 2026-05 (RECIST 1.1).
CT chest: RUL target lesion 2.4 cm, measurable per RECIST 1.1.
2026-06: ANC 3.1, Hgb 11.8, Plt 220k, bili 0.7, Cr 0.9, AST/ALT normal — adequate organ/marrow function.
No history of interstitial lung disease. No prior chemotherapy.
Patient able to understand and willing to sign informed consent.
